payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You guys begin to approach, stepping carefully towards the base of this. The ship, where it's sitting, it's resting at an odd angle, the front of it, the bow slightly angled upward. You can see the side where this large explosion tore through the hull. Already, for as long as it's been there, which has not been but a year maybe, tops, you can see the rust and the barnacles beginning to gather and claim the shipwreck to join. But that's best you can make out with the lack of light down here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Super dehydrating.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll try to coax it out. (blowing)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I mean, you're not having to siphon it like gasoline! As soon as you open it, it begins to diffuse into the nearby sea. It's very briny alcohol.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Gets the job done.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This darkened cloud is filling around Nott's face.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is this where Dashilla is? Or is she at a different place?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Per the song? I mean--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It said that she was in this Diver's Grave general location, so maybe she's not here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, so there could be something really scary in here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I mean, what are the chances? The ocean's huge.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The chances are really good, Fjord. They're really good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, do you have our luck? You've seen it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Glass half empty, I get it. It's all right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Apparently she has a hungry eye.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Got eyes right now. All right, we'll push forward.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As you guys have gotten closer to around the side of the ship where the most extensive damage was taken, you can see where the top of the deck and the edges are blackened from a fire that broke out, probably during or shortly after the explosion, but before it sank fully. The edges of the cargo hold that are blown open-- as soon as you begin to peer in the inside, you can see the interior is blackened as well, amongst the other patches of sea life that have begun to reclaim it as a home, and bits of seaweed, and general sea vegetation that has begun to find its way inside the empty ship.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So you all were double-crossed, clearly.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I don't know why, though. I didn't see anybody.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Onward, I guess.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He made it off safely?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't know. I assume.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You did hear tale of him passing through Nicodranas not too long ago.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sabian is the same person as Vandren?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, Sabian was someone I grew up with who was also brought by Vandren to work on the ship. Yeah, I've known him for many, many years, and he's always been a piece of shit of one variety or another. Only in the most recent years did I think that maybe that stuff had faded between us, and we'd found a way to work together. But apparently not.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As you guys finish doing your once-over of the chamber, you find a false shelf bottom under one of the bookcases that was toppled over. As you pull inside, it looks like it may have been what this box was inside. It has been pulled open and broken, the wood compartment partially shattered in the front. Looking through, this room has been pretty ransacked.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: How big a creature does it look like was taking a--?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a nature check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, like an inch between the claw marks or a couple inches?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 21 on investigation.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Looking at it, the claw marks are probably roughly an inch to an inch and a half apart, and there's four of them. It looks like an indentation for a thumb across one side, almost like whoever was grabbing it was pulling it open this way and, as they pulled it open, their fingers scratched across the metal as it bent and broke open.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: While they're doing this, you can tell if it moves, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Mm-hmm.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: They mentioned that Dashilla has claws that grasp. Just throwing that out there. Really committed that song to memory.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hungry eye, claws, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Claws that grasp.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Glad you remembered that. I'm kind of forgetful.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Let's roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Locate Ariel.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, mermaids? I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a history check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It could also be someone who was having dreams, Fjord.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: True. Very true.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I mean, there was one other time that you encountered creatures that seemed to be gathering and hoarding things that were shiny and happened to be affiliated with underwater existence.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry, I can't wait any longer. Do you mind if we go? This is all too strange.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Be on guard.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Where are you exiting?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fuck it, we'll go back up above deck, and we'll jump off the stern in the direction that Jester--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, make a perception check for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are the globules of light around?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: If we are in a group, they are. They were around the group.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Goddamn it!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's why I said switch to a fucking dice that I gave you!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Take your pills, Travis. Take your pills.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Three.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: In your excitement in having this thread of possibility towards recovering this third and final orb, from what you understand, you immediately turn around and swim and dart outward towards where the deck is, into the open waters, just as your eyes clarify to see three large figures that are floating about 20 or so feet ahead that seems to have encircled the deck. In but a split second, you can immediately make out their outline. You can see the sides of the frilled head. You can see the long, fish-like lower torso, and you can see the familiar tridents with chains affixed to the edge.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck! Now we're underwater with them?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Now we're going to fight underwater?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Ten points of damage. You have advantage on that attack, by the way, because of the Guiding Bolt.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Am I within 20 feet of the guy that she just marked? If I swim up?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have 25 feet. You can get right up to it. I'll shift these guys here a little bit to make a space for it where they were.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I jump off and parkour off.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Slow motion parkour!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I get really frustrated, and so I dog paddle the rest of the way. Then I'm going to take my--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Is your speed 50, then?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, it's 45. That's why I was saying 20 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, got you. So it would be 20 feet because you round down in D&D unless it specially says otherwise. So you'd be just out of range.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Then let me spend a ki point to do Step of the Wind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, that'll get you the distance you need there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Which sucks, but that's okay. Then I'm going to attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Do it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Just jam my staff into its face. Not too bad. 22.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 22 hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. That's good. Ten.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: One bite with its claw and one with its bite against, I'm going to say you, since you're the only one who actually managed to connect with it physically. As you rush up into its face and slam it once, the other attack misses as it curves under. It goes (snarling). Its jaw opens to try and snap towards your shoulder and neck area.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Actually, you gain plus three to damage rolls on Hexblade's Curse, so instead of 21--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, so you cursed that guy?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, with my bonus action, I did that first. So 22 total, so add three. With my movement, I will move back under the deck where Caduceus and Caleb and Jester are.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You going to stay in the doorway or move into the chamber?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: One step in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. One step into the room?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you'd still be there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Not so I'm blocking the entry, but just so that I'm in, out of thrown-harpoon way, you know what I mean?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you probably move that way then. That ends your go. That brings us to their turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This one right there in the front, it's going to make-- let's see here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 16 attacks.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Since you ran up and carved at it. Or, yeah, it's going to try that. That's a natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Make a save.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Both of them make a save because they're both-- well, that one, no. That one missed the Slow. That is a 11 plus three, 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Minus four. Or minus a d4.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Minus four, ten. Yeah, it's still slowed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Don't you fuck around with me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's starting to turn around, too, seeing how things shifted here. It saw the light, and you can see what little bit of his expression underwater at this point. They followed this light to inspect it, thought they had an ambush on a creature, and suddenly this party emerged. Now, well, that one's in a really rough spot. This one is looking like it's about to turn and try and flee. That's going to end the shallow priest's turn and the other one's turn. I haven't done that one yet, right? That one is going to attempt to use its harpoon against you, Fjord.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Right, because it is now reckless.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, I'm canceling the critical, anyway.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You use Channel Divinity once to cancel the critical on that. As the harpoon comes towards you, there's this slight, dull green barrier that seems to slow the penetration of the immediate lightning-fast pace of this harpoon. It manages to carve into the front of your armor and pierce through ever so slightly. It's not a critical hit, unfortunately.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's 11 points of piercing damage to you. After it carves through and wounds you, it pushes through the other way, and you manage to roll off. It would've been far worse damage if Caduceus hadn't helped you in that moment. It's going to attempt to move away. Yasha gets attack of opportunity.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes, she does. Reckless for a straight roll.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The spell fades, but you still know the general direction of where it was coming from. Up to you if you want to cast it again or continue on based on the memory.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, yeah. 22.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 22, that's great. As you guys step off of the edge of your ship's wreckage, and all slowly sink down to find the floor of the ocean once more and the subtle grade that continues downward. As you being to step, following Jester, moving forward, you see another shape begin to approach. Jester, you see it first and glance over. It's another ship.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Under the water or on the surface?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, another ship, sunken, here. You continue on for another 100 or 150 or so feet, and you see the shape off to the right of another shipwreck.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (whispering) It's a graveyard.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're definitely in that shit now. The song? Y'all remember the song?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The Diver's Grave!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we should go up for supplies.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That's going to itch like a motherfucker in the morning.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's keep on going.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But maybe--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Someone say it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: As we approach this area that he's described to us, this white coral, you said it was in a valley, like a dip?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: At the top of where the valley is, is there any cover that we might be able to get up behind and then peek down into said valley, like boulders?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you're moving through this area, there are clumps of seaweed that rise up hundreds of feet out of view. The base of it is pretty thick and you could try and move through that. That's what you are using to stealth as you come through, darting from section to section of this heavy underwater vegetation.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can we cut some of the seaweed and hold it in front of us so that when we move it just looks like seaweed?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Kind of into it, actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll jump on that train, yeah.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You're maybe about, since you stopped at that edge before it begins to descend over, you're about 60 or so feet from this.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean I can only get it 120 feet away from me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It will also put it at alert even before we get there. You send it in and it sees this other Jester and then it is ready for a fight.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I could send an image of a fish or something in there and see what happens, or some other type of creature.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I mean, if it's a trap that can be sprung by something going in, maybe fish or maybe a humanoid, that would probably be good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, we don't want it to know we're here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, they're going to know really quick, right? We're not going to make it in silently, right? I mean, this is clearly a honeypot, it's a trap. Might as well spring the trap.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, we could send in an image of a fish and see, but an image of a fish-- it's not movement of water, it's not the same.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're on this ridge.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. Your feet find soft footfall on the sediment that has gathered there, knocking up a little bit of it for a minute before it all eventually settles once more. Looking inside, make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to swim down and I'm going to have her skip around and see the coins and be like-- and go over and act like she's going to try to get the coins.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You watch as the illusory Jester goes and performs a great stock video of excited lucky person, performing the reaction silently.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can it please be the infomercials where she has trouble collecting the coins?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Have you ever--?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Don't you hate it when--?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I can't hold shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 30 seconds pass of Jester doing the song and dance down there. No reaction.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Shit. It might need actual vibrations or--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, there's nothing down there. I'll jump down there and join Jester.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Fjord dives off the side and swims down towards the entrance to this cavern. As you approach you can see the coins plainly in front of you. Do you land at the entrance?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Mm-hmm.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Apparently. Well, if there was a week to use it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you step in the inside, it descends a bit, like makeshift natural paths, like stairs or grades that curve around and drop into the central chamber where you see it goes in two different directions, to the right and left. In the middle, there's a large cluster of this purplish-maroon seaweed. The outside of the leaves have a teal-ish blue color. It wraps up against the walls as well. As you swim through and move, the still water shifts with your movement; you can see some of it sway and move with your movement.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh fucking Jesus, our stealth is going to be balls here. What does the floor look like? Sand, silt, coins?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Looking down, make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can't you just tell me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Jesus, Travis!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The hell is wrong with us tonight?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What's wrong with you?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I used it up last week!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Moving quickly through, it's not moving rapidly. As soon as you see this, you begin to dart through. The only person who would be in danger is the very end. Caleb, since you're at the back, I need you to make a dexterity saving throw for me. Because as all of you start darting through and making your way, they're drifting and tangling in closer together.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just don't make it like Ring girl, okay? Or like The Grudge.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, stop, why would you want to put it out there?!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Or do.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (shushing)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You continue forward through this tunnel around the seaweed cluster in the center. Moving through in the same order that you situated there. There's just enough room, maybe ten feet across, to stay comfortably, you'd want to single-file it. As you walk through, the edges of the seaweed begin to drift forward, seemingly drawn in by the warmth of your bodies.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, it's drawing towards us, or it's pulling in?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's pulling in. There's the central section and the wall. As you begin to move through, it begins to slowly pull in to close in towards you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can we freeze it? Can we cast cold on it or something?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can we move fast?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You come around the corner and look. You guys are at the front. I need Jester and Fjord to make-- since you have the globes, you can move the globes ahead if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Expeditious Retreat! As a reaction.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Go for it. I'll let you do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You cast Expeditious Retreat. You manage to dart forward and out of the grasping hands of the seaweed through the use of your spell. You catch up, now darting forward through everybody next to Jester and Fjord.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you want to be in the middle.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Whatever I've got ten minutes of zip, baby! Let's go forward.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. There. We are moving forward in that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Just for fun, I'm going to tap Resistance on you. Well I'm just going to give you-- if anything happens in the next minute you can add a d4 to any saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Following the tunnel down for another 15 to 20 or so feet it curves around to the left. Do you continue and curve around the edge?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Mm-hmm.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Let's roll initiative. (yelling)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Where are the ghosts? They're just hanging out?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You glance over your shoulder?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: About 15 feet behind you. (yelling and groaning)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Not moving. Just looking at you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (distressed yell)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're being herded. That's great.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What you told me was that studying this thing, it seems to require elements to set it in motion? How did you describe it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you're getting closer, because the arcana is not an immediate thing, it's a slow process of study. There's a heavy elemental conjuring that this is capable of doing. It's very old, primal magic. Looking at the stone, the stains, and the interior of these ruins, there is distinctly a dark brown tint to elements of this table.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Some might say amber?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you scrape some of it with your fingernail, it flakes off. It has a consistency you're familiar with, that of a coagulated blood.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Caduceus, as you're looking over towards the throne, you look up and about ten feet above the throne, standing up in the seaweed holding onto the clusters of it, you see a female humanoid form mostly in shadow, hair down over the front of the face, one yellow eye peeking through on this side, and one half-open yellow eye glancing through, up against the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: She's right above the throne.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The song. Her hungry eye. It's in her fucking head.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as she scrambles across the side of the wall, behind the seaweed, and is gone.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: She's gone?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (yelling) No!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: No, I'd say it took you two or three minutes to study, so Expeditious is still on the table.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'd have been near Fjord, probably.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, so you'll be up here with the rest of them. The shape you saw up in this direction before it vanished.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: She's just a little thing!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So is Nott the Brave.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Why would you even say that to the DM? You know how much shit he has back there?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's just one person.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Stop it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Didn't look like she even had any weapons!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Did you ever see Cabin in the Woods? Do you know how bad this is going to get?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Dashilla rolled really good initiative. So, who's up first? 25 to 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Whoa.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Beau, Jester, and Cad both have 20s?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, Beau had 24.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. 20 to 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I had a 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Fjord at a 16. 15 to ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nott. Ten to five.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yasha had a seven.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god. Caleb.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Caleb?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Four.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm assuming the ten minutes for Expeditious is gone from studying the table?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That brings us to-- what did you guys both roll initiative on?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to cast Spiritual Guardians. Oh, sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Also, I'm going to back up into the wall so I can keep an eye down that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Not too close to the wall because of the seaweed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, no. See that little thing, that little node behind me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right here?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, so I can't be attacked from behind, but also I can keep an eye on--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you go against the wall?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: As long as there's no seaweed there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's seaweed there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, then I'm not going against the wall. I'm sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All the walls are coated in this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Then I'm going to take a step or two down to scatter us a little bit more.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Down this way?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I know, it's a little weird.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I'll put you there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Thank you. Yeah, anyway, I know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. That finishes your turn, Caduceus. That finishes your turn, Jester. Okay, Jester, you're casting Spiritual Guardians?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes. I'm going to step a couple steps toward Fjord.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There alongside him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Down to the-- yeah, okay. Then, yes, I'm going to--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, where do you want to go? If you want to move--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, I wanted to not be quite in a line with everybody else. I was going to be on the steps, if that's possible.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Here? Yeah, we'll make it work. There, sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You'll know I'm there. Yeah, sure. I go like this. They're the little spiritual unicorns, but they're seahorses because we're underwater.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Cute!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Now all these little glowing pink seahorses now surround you. 15-foot, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, 15 feet around me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Got it, okay. You have that up. You are also now concentrating on Spiritual Guardians. That finishes Jester's turn there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's so cute.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You've been braving the ocean for half a day.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: If you have the d4, you can use the d4.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, right, okay. Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, did you give a d4 to everybody?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, just to Fjord. Wisdom saving throw. Ha!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yasha rolled a five. Fjord rolled a 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Son of a bitch.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Fjord, you're fine. Yasha is frightened of Dashilla until the end of the round. Caleb?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Frightened.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You succeed. You manage to resist the fear effect.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Two.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Nope, Nott's immune to fear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's right, because you're drunk! (yelling)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're like, come at me, spirits!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I never knew there was anything good about the drunk!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It hasn't come into play!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nott becomes Nott the Brave when she's drunk.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Amazing!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So unaffected. Spirits, whatever!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Fuck you!

payload.raw_text: All right. That ends Yasha's turn. Caleb. You are conscious, prone, floating, sinking towards the ground as you come to consciousness as Yasha grabs and jolts you awake.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: (sword whoosh) You duck out of the way. "What the hell?"

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. That ends Yasha's turn. Caleb. You are conscious, prone, floating, sinking towards the ground as you come to consciousness as Yasha grabs and jolts you awake.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay let's do it anyway.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so she goes into a rage?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: And that's her turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right that ends Yasha's go. At the end of Yasha's turn it's going to use another legendary action to use Forced Vision on you, Fjord. I need you to go ahead and make a melee attack against Beau, as you glance around and suddenly she's right there in front of you. And you take your falchion, swing out to try and take her out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Has disadvantage, because I have Patient Defense.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep. So you have disadvantage on the strike.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay, that's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: But you do have plus d4s to each of the hits because of Bless.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh shitballs. That's at two plus eight is ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Plus a d4.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Plus a d4 is--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He misses.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (sword whoosh) You duck out of the way. "What the hell?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Dick!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm like, I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (confused noises)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's now Dashilla's turn. She gets her legendary actions back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nine points of radiant damage, nice. (spell impact, angry snarl)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't like the look of this thing. I'm going to turn invisible and I'm going to back up a little into the...

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you turn invisible and you're going to back up into here, into this little corner?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I mean down the steps a bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, there?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Towards me. Oh, I got a thing still.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Over here?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, so I'm far enough away from anything that I might need to fuck with.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Got it. And you are invisible there. Good to know. All right, at the end of your turn, the lair action kicks in. Clouded Waters. Now you watch as the silt, the muck, and the bones all of a sudden begin to swirl up into the waters around you and obscure the area. The entire lair is now considered heavily obscured. You cannot see more than five feet in front of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Whoa.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That ends that. It is now Dashilla's turn. Dashilla is going to go ahead and move ten feet up to Jester.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Everybody but me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. No, sorry, everybody but Beau. Beau's the one who's central to this chamber.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yasha has advantage on those.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She does. What's up?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You've got a d4 on saves also. Dex save?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Dex save, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Success.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20 for Fjord and a 19 for Yasha.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Great, success.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Didn't have to roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry, not you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Success.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Success.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Six.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Caduceus, as the seaweed extends outward, most of you manage to duck out of the way. However, it wraps around and pulls Caduceus to the wall. You are grappled and you take 11 points of poison damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As you're walking, some of the seaweed reaches out and the unicorns (fizzle). It lasts for ten minutes, right? As you approach they eventually flitter out. You all gather there at the entrance.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I follow Fjord out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Nott and I meet the rest of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to try to get as much platinum and stuff as I can before I walk out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I am just waiting for something to move.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ten. Nine. But there were piles of shiny things.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know. You gather in pocket, and counting it later, you will find that you have found roughly three platinum, six gold, 12 silver, and about 65 copper.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Boo.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't like this place.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right. I'll follow them out. I'll tap Yasha: We should get out of here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's got an uncomfortable look on her face after watching all this transpire, goes, "Yeah. I think we better should."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I didn't like it either, Yasha.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Her brow tenses and she follows you out. As you all converge towards the central chamber once more--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The guards are floating, following us.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The ship unfurls the functional sails on it and slowly limps its way in the direction of the archipelago. You travel for a good hour or so before you notice the sky that was somewhat cloudy, begin to go rapidly darker, roughly near where you were. The clouds begin to swell and release rain. It begins to rain on your ship, but you begin to push away from this mounting storm.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys can see the Squalleater is a bit of a hike from where you currently are from where you've traveled, but it is visible as there is no other landmass on the horizon.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We'll be moving at twice speed since it's normal speed and not our halved speed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Outstanding.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like I'm walking on jello, but I like it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You ever see those videos with the (tapping) walking on the pudding. Like that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys make your way towards the Squalleater, hail your team, and are brought back onto the ship. The sails are unfurled. As Orly turns to you, he goes, "Where we going, Captain?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Make for the... Gravid Archipelago?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Gravid Archipelago, all righty.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's not where we were going before.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Aye, aye."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sure it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I thought we were going to the other place--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're not there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, okay.
